title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 319.205 - Notice to cities and counties required to adopt ordinance, contents
text:
319.205.  Notice to cities and counties required to adopt ordinance, contents. — The commissioner of administration shall notify each city, town, village or county required under sections 319.200 to 319.207 to adopt an ordinance or order of its obligations under sections 319.200 to 319.207.
(L. 1990 S.B. 539 § 1 subsec. 7)
